title: Kibud Av Va'Em: The Mitzvah of Honoring Parents — Even Difficult Ones
title_zh: 孝敬父母的诫命：即使是困难的父母关系
title_he: כיבוד אב ואם: מצוות כיבוד הורים — אפילו הורים קשים
description: The Torah's commandment to honor parents — what it requires (standing, not contradicting, providing food), its limits, and how converts fulfill it.
author: Torah Light Project
chinese_parallels: Confucian concept of xiao (孝, filial piety)
Comparison between Jewish and Chinese approaches to honoring parents
